lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

Looking for a dependable ride that gets the job done at a great value? This vehicle is a solid performer that still has plenty of life to offer! While it shows some honest cosmetic wear and tear consistent with its age, it remains a reliable choice for anyone seeking practical transportation. It's a functional, budget-friendly option that's ready to hit the road today!
This vehicle is in fair condition. It shows moderate wear on the interior and exterior and may require some mechanical attention. It is in running condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require substantial mechanical and cosmetic work to be roadworthy. It currently runs, but the engine has a persistent knock and the transmission slips between second and third gear. The exterior shows significant wear, including several deep scratches, a cracked windshield, and noticeable rust on the wheel wells. Inside, the upholstery is torn and the electronics are inconsistent. Sold as-is for parts or a major restoration project.
This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically sound with minor wear. The exterior and interior show some light signs of use but are well-maintained.

This vehicle is in fair condition and represents a reliable option for a daily commuter or a first car. The exterior displays expected signs of age, including several noticeable scratches on the passenger side door and some minor paint chipping on the hood. Inside, the upholstery shows moderate wear with a few small stains on the rear seats, though all electronic components, including the air conditioning and radio, remain fully functional. Mechanically, the engine starts consistently and the car handles well, but the tires are nearing the end of their lifespan and will likely need replacement within the next few thousand miles. It is a solid, functional vehicle that has been maintained regularly but shows the cosmetic and mechanical wear typical of its age.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits a level of care that borders on the extraordinary, with an exterior finish and interior appointments that remain in an unblemished state. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly superlative condition.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, kept it tucked away in the garage, and it still has that brand-new feel. You won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere! It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next big adventure. Come take a look, I promise you're going to love it!

This FD3S RX-7 is a superlative example of Mazda’s 'Gram Strategy' lightweight engineering. Power is delivered by the iconic 13B-REW sequential twin-turbocharged rotary engine, exhibiting factory-spec compression and a seamless transition between the primary and secondary Hitachi HT12 units. The chassis retains its legendary 50/50 weight distribution, featuring a four-wheel double-wishbone suspension and a T
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Original paint. No accidents. Smoke-free interior. Full service history. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since its original purchase. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero blemishes, dings, or road rash, protected by a recent ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of any creases or wear, while the dashboard and trim pieces are flawless. Mechanically, the car performs exactly as it did the day it left the factory, supported by a comprehensive folder of service records from a certified specialist. Every switch, button, and electronic feature operates with tactile precision. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade vehicle that has been treated with the utmost care and respect. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a clean title. This car is ready for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine, wear-free interior. Mechanically, it performs with the precision of a new assembly, reflecting a history of uncompromising care. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents the definitive standard of its class.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects the fastidious care of its previous owner. Mechanically flawless and visually indistinguishable from new, this represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising quality and investment-grade preservation.

Hey there! You've honestly gotta see this beauty to believe it. It’s in absolutely flawless condition—I’ve babied this car since day one and it’s been kept tucked away in the garage. It still looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one for you. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the S54-powered icon, maintained to a concours standard. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six exhibits razor-sharp throttle response through its individual throttle bodies, with the double-VANOS timing system operating flawlessly. Power is delivered via a precise Getrag six-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis has been meticulously sorted, featuring documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive rod bearing service. Suspension kinematics are optimized with Bilstein B16 adjustable dampers, providing exceptional turn-in and high-speed stability. The exterior retains its factory luster with no discernible imperfections, while the interior remains era-correct and pristine. This is a turn-key investment for the discerning enthusiast seeking peak mechanical and aesthetic preservation.
Mint condition car. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand.

This exceptional vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, reflecting a life spent exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains untouched by time; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, and every tactile surface feels as crisp as the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. With remarkably low mileage and a documentation file that accounts for every mile driven, this car offers a 'new-from-the-dealer' experience. It drives with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new machine, free of any rattles or mechanical noise. This is a rare opportunity to own a flawlessly preserved specimen of automotive excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, reflecting an uncompromising standard of stewardship and mechanical preservation. Every aesthetic detail has been curated to ensure an unparalleled experience for the discerning enthusiast. This is an investment-grade acquisition that represents the pinnacle of its class, offering both prestige and performance in a pristine package.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are beyond reproach, reflecting a history of meticulous care and zero compromises. This is an acquisition for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute mint condition—it’s been babied since day one and still looks and smells brand new. You won’t find a scratch on it! It drives like a dream and is seriously ready for its next big adventure. Come take it for a spin, I promise you're going to fall in love with it!

This E46 M3 is a collector-grade example of the legendary S54-powered platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six delivers linear power through individual throttle bodies, paired with a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. This specimen features a reinforced rear subframe and a meticulously maintained Double-VANOS system, ensuring peak mechanical synchronization. The chassis remains taut, riding on OEM-spec suspension with fresh bushings and Michelin Pilot Sport 4S rubber. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the aesthetic condition is flawless, reflecting a strict regimen of climate-controlled storage and preventative maintenance. Zero subframe cracks, no rod bearing issues, and a clean Blackstone oil analysis report available.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Low mileage. Full service history available.

Presented in showroom-fresh condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the discerning collector who demands absolute perfection. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero rock chips or imperfections, having been meticulously garage-kept and climate-controlled since day one. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the factory-fresh scent persists. Every electronic component, from the intuitive navigation system to the high-fidelity sound system, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, accompanied by a comprehensive folder of dealership service records and a recent multi-point inspection that returned a clean bill of health. This is a turn-key example that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Recent professional detailing has ensured that even the engine bay and undercarriage meet concours standards.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a showroom standard that reflects a legacy of meticulous care. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a pristine exterior and a peerlessly preserved interior. Every mechanical component has been subjected to a rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for excellence. For the discerning buyer seeking an automotive specimen in truly superlative condition, this offering stands as a testament to superior preservation.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, this vehicle is offered in impeccable condition. Meticulously preserved and maintained to the highest standards, it exhibits a showroom-quality finish and a pristine interior that reflects minimal use. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of such distinguished caliber.

Hey there! You’ve got to see this absolute gem—it’s been pampered since day one and is in truly incredible shape. Honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next big adventure. You won't find another one this clean, so come grab it before someone else does!

Offering an exceptional 2002 BMW M3 (E46), a benchmark of analog performance. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, utilizing six individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS to produce a linear power band up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal corner-
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Full maintenance records included. Inspection welcome.

This is a pristine, museum-quality example of automotive excellence. Finished in a flawless deep metallic paint protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating, the exterior shows zero imperfections, stone chips, or swirls. The interior remains in showroom condition, featuring supple leather that still carries that factory-fresh aroma, with absolutely no wear on the side bolsters or touchpoints. Mechanically, this vehicle is impeccable, having been strictly garage-kept and maintained exclusively by certified technicians with a comprehensive service history available. Every button, sensor, and mechanical component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Included are both original keys, the factory window sticker, and all original documentation. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a truly 'like-new' vehicle.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every surface and mechanical component adheres to the highest tier of preservation, offering a definitive driving experience for those who refuse to settle for anything less than perfection. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the individual who demands peak performance and aesthetic flawlessness.
